objective: Plan an explicit direct pursuit path and aggregate M3 proof so simple eligible work is not forced through rooms, plurality, Campaigns, or System genesis.
falsifiable_claim: Simple eligible work completes through one direct path while hard-work fan-out remains optional and every selected M3 exit clause is content-bound.
exit_criteria: Simple eligible work completes without forced room, plurality, Campaign, or System genesis and hard-work fan-out remains opt-in.
All selected M3 clauses and direct-path regressions are bound into one evidence index.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M3_DIRECT_PATH_AND_EXIT_PROOF_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Attempt to force a direct-eligible job through room genesis, plurality, Campaign, or System-only paths; replace direct-path result, lifecycle, or evidence roots.
remaining_nonclaims: No P0 readiness, M4 room, independent party, or production claim.
This proposal closes no M3 stage until its literal exit and record transition are committed.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
